fields.name: Order No
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the Posted Inventory Order.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the Posted Inventory Order Line.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected quantity of Serial No., Lot No. and Package No. that relates to the Base Unit of Measure Code, in the Posted Inventory Order Line.
